analysis:
【今日摘要】
今日市場情緒熱烈，道瓊未來指數和納斯達克指數期貨持續上漲，科技股大幅跳升。NVIDIA Corp. (NVDA) 宣布 Anthropic 的 Claude 模型在 Microsoft Foundry 上運行，Microsoft Copilot AI 聊天機器人整合為統一應用程式。OPEC+ 再度提高產量，然而這次的增產主要是象徵性的。混合動力車輛成為美國汽車市場的新宠兒，電動車需求下滑。市場已經開始出現跡象，股市的紅熱動能交易可能會在本月面臨激烈的反彈。

【結語】
投資者應該謹慎調整投資組合，避免過度押注。伯克希爾的投資信號出現，可能指示市場即將出現大幅波動。投資者應該保持冷靜，評估風險和機會。同時，投資者也應該注意到混合動力車輛的趨勢，可能是未來汽車市場的新方向。

【精選個股】
NVDA - NVIDIA Corp. - NVIDIA Corp. 宣布 Anthropic 的 Claude 模型在 Microsoft Foundry 上運行，展現出人工智慧領域的強大實力。
MSFT - Microsoft Corp. - Microsoft Copilot AI 聊天機器人整合為統一應用程式，展現出人工智慧領域的應用潛力。
TSLA - Tesla Inc. - 混合動力車輛成為美國汽車市場的新宠兒，電動車需求下滑，可能是未來汽車市場的新方向。
AAPL - Apple Inc. - 蘋果公司的股價持續上漲，展現出公司的強大實力和未來發展前景。
GOOGL - Alphabet Inc. - Alphabet Inc. 的股價持續上漲，展現出公司的強大實力和未來發展前景。

風險提醒：投資者應該謹慎評估風險和機會，避免過度押注。

items.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Techs Jump; Apple, SpaceX, Sandisk, Robinhood In Focus
items.summary: The Nasdaq and many AI stocks like Sandisk are at key levels. Also watch Apple, SpaceX and Robinhood.
items.zh_title: 道瓊未來指數上漲，科技股大幅跳升；蘋果、太空探索技術、SanDisk、Robinhood備受關注
items.zh_point: 道瓊未來指數和許多人工智慧股價如SanDisk已達關鍵水平，同時也要關注蘋果、太空探索技術和Robinhood的表現。

items.title: NVIDIA Corp. (NVDA) Shares Updates Around Claude Models Running on Blackwell Ultra GPUs
items.summary: NVIDIA Corp. (NASDAQ:NVDA) is one of BlackRock’s 30 most important AI stocks right now. On June 29, the company shared that Anthropic’s Claude models in Microsoft Foundry, hosted on Microsoft Azure and running on NVIDIA GB300 Blackwell Ultra GPUs, are now publicly available. It provides Azure-native businesses a robust new way to develop domain-specific and […]
items.zh_title: NVIDIA Corp. (NVDA) 分享 Claude 模型在 Blackwell Ultra GPU 上運行的最新消息
items.zh_point: NVIDIA Corp. (NASDAQ:NVDA) 是 BlackRock 目前 30 個最重要的 AI 股票之一。該公司宣布，Anthropic 的 Claude 模型在 Microsoft Foundry 上，使用 Microsoft Azure 和 NVIDIA GB300 Blackwell Ultra GPU 运行，現在已經公開可用。

items.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Highlighted a New AI Bottleneck. 3 AI Stocks That Could Benefit.
items.summary: As these companies try to solve a new AI bottleneck, their stock prices keep climbing.
items.zh_title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang 提及新一波人工智慧瓶頸，3 家公司有望受益
items.zh_point: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang 指出人工智慧領域出現新瓶頸，相關公司股價持續上漲。

items.title: What This Rare Historical Market Signal Means for Your Portfolio
items.summary: The signal is named for Warren Buffett, who advised on when it's in scary territory -- such as now.
items.zh_title: 當伯克希爾的信號出現時，意味著什麼？
items.zh_point: 伯克希爾的投資信號出現，可能指示市場即將出現大幅波動，投資者應該謹慎調整投資組合。

items.title: Microsoft Corp. (MSFT) Plans to Turn its Copilot AI Chatbots Into Unified App
items.summary: Microsoft Corp. (NASDAQ:MSFT) is one of BlackRock’s 30 most important AI stocks right now. BlackRock is the largest institutional holder, with 7.99% or 593.33 million outstanding shares in the company, as per the filings on March 31. As of the close of July 2, the consensus sentiment around Microsoft Corp. (NASDAQ:MSFT) was also strongly bullish. […]
items.zh_title: 微軟公司計畫將 Copilot AI 聊天機器人整合為統一應用程式
items.zh_point: 微軟公司正計劃將其 Copilot AI 聊天機器人整合為統一應用程式，公司股價持續保持強勁的市場情緒，BlackRock 是公司最大的機構持有者，持有 7.99% 的股份。

items.title: S&P 500 and Nasdaq futures extend gains after a strong week on Wall Street: Live updates
items.summary: The Dow climbed nearly 2% last week, putting it within striking distance of 53,000, a level it has never reached.
items.zh_title: 道瓊指數和納斯達克指數期貨延續上週的漲勢：即時更新
items.zh_point: 道瓊指數上週大幅上漲近2%，將其推至接近53,000點的關鍵水平，創下歷史新高。

items.title: What caused the pre-holiday chip stock slump and what to do about it
items.summary: The problem is that we have seen this horror movie before.
items.zh_title: 假期前芯片股大跌原因何在？該如何應對？
items.zh_point: 芯片股在假期前出現大跌，市場人士擔心這是經歷過的恐怖片。

items.title: Delta pilot says ‘big bang’ felt after flight apparently hit by fireworks while landing in Chicago
items.zh_title: 芝加哥降落時飛機疑遭爆竹擊中　機長稱「巨大爆炸」感覺
items.zh_point: 一名Delta航空公司的飛機在芝加哥降落時疑似遭到爆竹擊中，機長表示在降落過程中感到了一個巨大的爆炸。

items.title: Three sons of Iran's slain leader Khamenei appear at funeral, not his successor
items.summary: Iranian state TV showed Khamenei's sons Mostafa, Meysam and Masoud praying at the funeral. Supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei was not seen.
items.zh_title: 伊朗前領袖卡梅尼的三子出席父親葬禮 但未見繼任者
items.zh_point: 伊朗國營電視台播出卡梅尼三子穆斯塔法、梅薩姆和馬蘇德在父親葬禮上祈禱，最高領袖莫傑塔巴·卡梅尼卻未有露面。

items.title: Trump to meet with Ukraine's Zelenskyy and Syria's al-Sharaa during the NATO summit
items.summary: Trump plans to meet with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy and Syrian President Ahmad al-Sharaa on Wednesday, the White House said.
items.zh_title: 特朗普將會見烏克蘭總統澤連斯基和敘利亞總統阿拉沙
items.zh_point: 特朗普將於北約峰會期間會見烏克蘭總統澤連斯基和敘利亞總統阿拉沙，白宮已經公布了此消息。

items.title: U.S. stock futures rise as Wall Street looks to extend its rally coming off the holiday weekend
items.summary: U.S. stock-index futures gained on Sunday, with Wall Street looking to extend last week’s gains.
items.zh_title: 美股期貨上漲 美股欲延續假期後的牛市
items.zh_point: 美股期貨在假期後上漲，預示美股欲延續上週的漲勢。

items.title: OPEC+ raises output levels again despite tumbling crude prices
items.summary: Major oil producers on Sunday agreed once again to modestly increase their crude production, although, as in previous months, the hike is largely symbolic until a peace deal between the U.S. and Iran sticks and the Strait of Hormuz is fully reopened to shipping traffic.
items.zh_title: OPEC+ 再度提高產量儘管原油價格大幅下跌
items.zh_point: 儘管原油價格大幅下跌，OPEC+仍決定再度提高產量，然而這次的增產主要是象徵性的，直到美國和伊朗達成和解並霍爾木茲海峽完全恢復航運，增產才會真正實現。

items.title: I have no kids. Will I cause family drama by leaving different amounts to my nieces and nephews?
items.summary: “Part of me would prefer to leave more to those for whom the money could make a meaningful difference.”
items.zh_title: 我沒有孩子，會否因為遺贈不同金額給侄女侄子而引起家庭紛爭？
items.zh_point: 一個人沒有孩子，卻想在遺贈中對侄女侄子的照顧有所不同，這可能會引起家庭內的矛盾和爭議。

items.title: Hybrids are the breakout star of the U.S. car market as EV demand fades
items.summary: Hybrids aren’t a bridge to EVs anymore — instead, they’re winning on function and price.
items.zh_title: 混合動力車輛成為美國汽車市場的新宠兒，電動車需求下滑
items.zh_point: 混合動力車輛已經不再是電動車的過渡階段，而是因為其功能和價格優勢而受歡迎。

items.title: Why the stock market’s red-hot momentum trade might be headed for a violent unwind this month
items.summary: Momentum trades tend to struggle in July — but this year may be particularly volatile, says one strategist. The rumblings have already started.
items.zh_title: 股市的紅熱動能交易可能會在本月面臨激烈的反彈
items.zh_point: 一位策略家指出，動能交易往往在七月會遇到困難，但今年可能會特別惡劣。市場已經開始出現跡象。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大幅下跌，受中國DeepSeek事件影響
items.zh_point: 美國股市大多下跌，Nasdaq指數領跌，AI基礎設施製造商大幅下跌，Nvidia股價下跌16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 紐約金屬交易所金、銀價格下跌
items.zh_point: 紐約金屬交易所金價下跌1.4%，銀價下跌2.5%，連續兩天下跌，金價下跌兩天中第三天，銀價連續下跌三天中第四天。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國深度探索的AI：深Seek
items.zh_point: 中國新興公司宣稱以低成本訓練高表現的AI模型，且不使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度尋求不會讓美國AI巨頭沉淪
items.zh_point: 對於Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭的股價下跌，市場的恐慌情緒可能過度膨脹。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與電信周報：市場熱話
items.zh_point: DeepSeek、SoFi 等科技、媒體和電信相關公司在最新的市場熱話中獲得關注。

items.title: International Tower Hill Mines: Ongoing Dilution And Gold Price Risk Make It A Hold
items.zh_title: 國際塔爾山礦業：持續的稀釋和黃金價格風險使其成為持有股票
items.zh_point: 國際塔爾山礦業因持續的稀釋和黃金價格風險而受到質疑，其投資價值可能受到影響。

items.title: Quant snapshot: PENG, and LEVI lead top-rated names as EPAC and SMPL lag
items.zh_title: 量化快照：PENG和LEVI領先評級榜單，EPAC和SMPL則落後
items.zh_point: PENG和LEVI在量化評估中表現出色，排名領先，而EPAC和SMPL則表現不佳，落後於其他公司。

items.title: Zoetis: The 60% Decline Was Justified, But Shares Are Finally Buyable
items.zh_title: 齊奧迪斯：60%的下跌是合理的，但現在是買入的時機
items.zh_point: 齊奧迪斯股價曾經下跌達60%，但分析師認為該公司的下跌是合理的，現在股價已經有了買入的機會。

items.title: JCE: Strong Total Returns With An Attractive Discount
items.zh_title: JCE: 強勁總回報與吸引人的折扣
items.zh_point: JCE 的股價表現強勁，目前的市場價格相較於其實際價值有明顯的折扣，可能是投資者的機會。

items.title: Greene County Bancorp's Surge Doesn't Mean It's Time To Pile In
items.zh_title: 格林縣銀行集團的躍升並不代表著買入的時機
items.zh_point: 格林縣銀行集團的股價上漲，可能是市場對該公司財務表現的認可，但投資者應謹慎評估該公司的財務狀況和未來發展前景，避免過度押注。

items.title: Record wave of IPO lock-up shares to hit Hong Kong market
items.zh_title: 香港上市公司掛牌禁售股東股東股權將大幅流入市場
items.zh_point: 香港市場即將迎來一波史上最大規模的IPO掛牌禁售股權解禁，可能對市場造成重大影響。

items.title: Trump intervention sparks World Cup storm as FIFA clears Balogun to face Belgium
items.zh_title: 特朗普干預引發世界盃風暴 FIFA准許巴洛古努面對比利時
items.zh_point: 特朗普的干預引發世界盃風暴，FIFA宣布巴洛古努可在世界盃對比利時進行比賽。

items.title: Anthropic plans to buy 1.4-GW Australian data centre capacity, AFR reports
items.zh_title: Anthropic 計劃購買 1.4-GW 澳洲數據中心容量，澳洲金融報導
items.zh_point: 美國科技公司 Anthropic 將購買澳洲數據中心的 1.4-GW 容量，據澳洲金融報導。

items.title: Shares edge higher in Asia as oil dips, earnings loom
items.zh_title: 亞洲股市微升油價跌，盼待業績公布
items.zh_point: 亞洲股市在油價下跌的情況下微幅上升，投資者正在等待企業的財務報告公布。

items.title: Wall St futures rise as investors reassess AI trade, await Fed minutes
items.zh_title: 紐約街區未來股價上漲，投資人重新評估AI交易，等待美聯儲會議記錄
items.zh_point: 紐約街區未來股價上漲，投資人重新評估人工智慧交易的風險和機會，同時等待美聯儲會議的記錄，以了解未來貨幣政策的走向。
